name: The Whole Audience Laughs
flavor: You deliver the biggest punchline of the show, and it lands on everyone at once. Nobody in the audience gets to not laugh.
description: You choose any number of creatures you can see within range — you may freely exclude your allies from the effect, so your own company never has to make this save. Each remaining target must make a Wisdom saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. On a failure, a target falls prone and is incapacitated with helpless laughter for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, and whenever it takes damage, an affected target can make another Wisdom saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature immune to being charmed automatically succeeds on its save.
sheetSummary: Once per combat. Action, 60 ft, costs 5 Mirth, concentration up to 1 minute. Choose any number of visible creatures (allies may be excluded). Wis save vs trick save DC or fall prone + incapacitated (helpless laughter). Each affected target saves again at end of each of its turns or when damaged, ending the effect on a success. Charm-immune creatures auto-succeed.
